caption: A woman with light brown skin and blonde-highlighted hair tied in a bun is recorded in a podcast studio. She is wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt with a white circular logo. She sits behind a professional black microphone, facing toward the left while smiling and laughing. Behind her is a white wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a black screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text above a stylized white graphic. Various logos appear on the screen, including a red and white graphic that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and a circular logo that says "STUDIO PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the woman maintains her seated position, continuing to smile and shift her gaze slightly while reacting to something off-screen. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
